headline: Eurozone Eyes Digital Euro Launch by 2025

article.title: The digital euro: Surveillance money, or a better alternative to cash?
article.summary: Proponents of the digital euro say its a better alternative to cash that’s fully backed by the ECB. But critics argue it could provide the EU with too much power over its citizens.

headline: Blockchain To Surge 30% On AI Adoption

article.title: Franklin Templeton calls agentic AI next ‘killer’ use case for blockchain
article.summary: Franklin Templeton’s digital assets lead said that the autonomous AI agent economy will increase demand for blockchain protocols hosting machine-to-machine micropayments.

headline: Stocks Drop 1% as Oil Surges 2% Ahead

article.title: Stocks Fall Before Alphabet’s Results as Oil Jumps: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Wall Street investors bracing for the start of the megacap earnings season sent stocks lower, with the market also falling as worries about an escalation in the Iran war boosted oil prices.

headline: Kuwait Bond Sale Draws $17.8 Billion Amid Tensions

article.title: Kuwait Bond Sale Bids Top $17.8 Billion Even as Iran Strikes
article.summary: Kuwait has drawn around $17.8 billion of investor orders for a benchmark dollar bond sale on Wednesday, highlighting resilient demand for the OPEC member’s debt even as it comes under daily missile and drone attacks from Iran.

headline: Bitcoin Supply Shrinks 30% Amid Summer Slump

article.title: VanEck: Bitcoin’s Summer Lull Masks a Tightening Supply Base
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

VanEck: Bitcoin’s Summer Lull Masks a Tightening Supply Base
VanEck says Bitcoin's quiet summer trading masks a tightening supply base, with cautious derivatives and weak miner economics weighing on the near term even as long-term holders continue accumulating.

headline: Satsuma Dumps 50% Bitcoin Stake, Delists in London

article.title: Satsuma Shareholders Approve Bitcoin Liquidation, London Delisting
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Satsuma Shareholders Approve Bitcoin Liquidation, London Delisting
Satsuma shareholders voted to sell the company's bitcoin, return the cash to investors, and delist from the London Stock Exchange, ending its run as a bitcoin treasury company after heavy losses.

headline: FATF Urges DeFi Regulation Amid 50% Centralization Risk

article.title: Centralized Elements 'Frequently Persist' in DeFi and Should Be Regulated: FATF
article.summary: Nearly every country has yet to apply the rules, the watchdog said, warning of outright bans for platforms that don’t comply.

headline: HTX Wallets Frozen Amid UK Sanctions: $100M Exposure

article.title: Justin Sun's HTX 'Rotating' On-Chain Wallets Amid UK Sanctions: TRM Labs
article.summary: TRM Labs says the UK-sanctioned exchange has rotated hot wallets across blockchains, leaving address-list screening struggling to keep pace.

headline: RWA Trading Surges to $470B Monthly Volume

article.title: Tokenized equity perps drive RWA trading boom to $470 billion monthly volume
article.summary: Within the broader RWA category, tokenized equities have been the more popular asset class to trade over tokenized commodities.

headline: Zilliqa Freezes $1B Transactions Over 2019 Ledger Bug

article.title: Zilliqa halts native transactions over bug in its Ledger app dating to 2019
article.summary: Zilliqa halted native transactions after revealing a bug in its Ledger app dating to 2019 that exposed private keys via onchain signatures.

headline: Venezuela's $13bn Oil Assets Frozen in US Custody

article.title: The US has collected about $13bn of Venezuela’s oil money. Where is it?
article.summary: Washington has given diverging accounts of where the earthquake-shattered country’s funds are going

headline: UK's £1bn Uni Sector Faces Private Ownership Shift

article.title: The UK’s biggest university is a private company
article.summary: Supporters say franchised providers widen access to further education, but others doubt the real value of their ‘no frills’ courses
